title: Online Ordering
orderInfoLine1: A minimum 48-hour preparation time is required for all orders.
orderInfoLine2: Orders must be picked up at the bakery on the selected date.
orderInfoLine3: Orders are paid by Interac e-Transfer after submission.
pickupNote: If your order includes sliced bread, please plan to pick up after 10:00 a.m.
name: Name
comments: Use this space for special requests or comments about your order.
paymentLine1: Please send payment by e-transfer to:
paymentLine2: Include your name with the transfer.
paymentLine3: Your order will be prepared once payment is received.
